title: British Mushroom Risotto
description: A rich and creamy risotto with a mix of sautéed mushrooms and a hint of British seasoning. This Italian-inspired dish is a perfect comfort food.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add mushrooms and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add white wine and cook until absorbed, about 2 minutes.
Add 1 cup of vegetable broth and cook, stirring constantly, until absorbed.
Repeat the process, adding the broth in 1 cup increments, until the rice is cooked and creamy, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in parmesan cheese and british seasoning.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
